title: ricinocarpus fournieri
intro: Ricinocarpus fournieri is a species of plant in the family Euphorbiaceae, commonly known as the spotted spurge, which is native to Australia and New Guinea. The medicinal properties of Ricinocarpus fournieri lie in its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate pain due to its anti-inflammatory and analgesic properties. The health benefits of this plant include its use in treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as its potential in reducing fever and relieving joint pain. In herbal preparations, Ricinocarpus fournieri is often used in the form of a tincture or salve, applied topically to affected areas to take advantage of its therapeutic properties.
